title: Fifi Makes a New Friend
description: Join Fifi the Fox on an exciting friendship adventure!

pages.text: Fifi was playing alone near the meadow when she heard a soft rustling in the tall grass. A tiny gray bunny peeked out with big shiny eyes.
Hello, said Fifi with a warm smile. I am Fifi. What is your name? The bunny trembled slightly and whispered, I am Bella.
Bella was shy and had never made a friend before. Fifi sat down next to her and offered a sweet berry from her pocket.
Bella smiled for the first time and shared a crunchy carrot with Fifi. They munched together and giggled about butterfly chases.
Would you like to be my friend? asked Fifi. Bella nodded happily and gave Fifi a gentle hug under the warm sunshine.
From that day on, Fifi and Bella played together every day. They learned that friends make the world brighter and happier.
